_meta.purpose: compile-verified Lean bridging-lemma library, mined by self_evolve.py; injected into the formalization writer prompt to eliminate lemma-name hallucination.

log.log_sub_one.desc: Gibbs/entropy core: log x ≤ x - 1 for x>0
log.log_sub_one.lean:
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Log.Basic
import Mathlib.Tactic
open Real

example (x : ℝ) : 0 < x → Real.log x ≤ x - 1 := by
  exact fun h => Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos h

exp.exp_add_one.desc: convexity core: 1 + x ≤ exp x for all x
exp.exp_add_one.lean:
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Exp
import Mathlib.Tactic
open Real

example (x : ℝ) : 1 + x ≤ Real.exp x := by
  rw [add_comm]
  exact add_one_le_exp x

exp.exp_pos.lean:
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Exp
import Mathlib.Tactic
open Real

example (x : ℝ) : 0 < Real.exp x := by
  exact exp_pos x

trig.sin_cos_sq.lean:
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Trigonometric.Basic
import Mathlib.Tactic
open Real

example (t : ℝ) : Real.sin t ^ 2 + Real.cos t ^ 2 = 1 := by
  exact?

trig.one_sub_cos_nonneg.lean:
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Trigonometric.Basic
import Mathlib.Tactic
open Real

example (t : ℝ) : 0 ≤ 1 - Real.cos t := by
  linarith [Real.cos_le_one t]

tanh.tanh_sign.desc: damping term y·tanh(y) is nonneg — Lie derivative of quadratic Lyapunov fn under tanh damping reduces to -y·tanh(y) ≤ 0
tanh.tanh_sign.lean:
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Trigonometric.Basic
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Trigonometric.DerivHyp
import Mathlib.Tactic
open Real
example (y : ℝ) : 0 ≤ y * Real.tanh y := by
  rw [tanh_eq_sinh_div_cosh, ← mul_div_assoc]
  apply div_nonneg _ (cosh_pos y).le
  rcases le_total 0 y with hy | hy
  · exact mul_nonneg hy (sinh_nonneg_iff.mpr hy)
  · have hs : sinh y ≤ 0 := by
      have h := sinh_nonneg_iff (x := -y)
      rw [sinh_neg] at h
      linarith [h.mpr (by linarith : (0:ℝ) ≤ -y)]
    nlinarith [mul_nonneg (neg_nonneg.2 hy) (neg_nonneg.2 hs)]

tanh.tanh_bound.lean:
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Trigonometric.Basic
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Trigonometric.DerivHyp
import Mathlib.Tactic
open Real
example (y : ℝ) : Real.tanh y ≤ 1 ∧ -1 ≤ Real.tanh y :=
  ⟨(tanh_lt_one y).le, (neg_one_lt_tanh y).le⟩

log.log_self_lower.lean:
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Log.Basic
import Mathlib.Tactic
open Real
example (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) : 1 - 1 / x ≤ Real.log x := by
  have h := Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (show (0:ℝ) < 1 / x by positivity)
  rw [one_div, Real.log_inv] at h
  rw [one_div]
  nlinarith [h]

sqrt.sqrt_sq_abs.desc: sqrt of a square is abs
sqrt.sqrt_sq_abs.lean:
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Pow.Real
import Mathlib.Tactic
open Real
example (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 ≤ x) : Real.sqrt (x ^ 2) = |x| := by
  rw [Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs]

piecewise.min_nonneg.desc: Case-split for nonsmooth min barriers: min(a,b)≥0 iff both ≥0
piecewise.min_nonneg.lean:
import Mathlib.Order.MinMax
import Mathlib.Data.Real.Basic
import Mathlib.Tactic
open Real

example (a b : ℝ) : 0 ≤ min a b ↔ 0 ≤ a ∧ 0 ≤ b := by
  exact le_min_iff

piecewise.conservation_harmonic.desc: Conservation law: d(r²)/dt = 0 for harmonic oscillator (ẋ=y, ẏ=-x)
piecewise.conservation_harmonic.lean:
import Mathlib.Data.Real.Basic
import Mathlib.Tactic
open Real

example (x y : ℝ) : x * y + y * (-x) = 0 := by ring

piecewise.annulus_barrier.goal: ∀ r a b : ℝ, a ≤ r → r ≤ b → 0 ≤ min (r - a) (b - r)
piecewise.annulus_barrier.desc: Annulus barrier: if r is in [a,b], then min(r-a, b-r) ≥ 0
piecewise.annulus_barrier.lean:
import Mathlib.Order.MinMax
import Mathlib.Data.Real.Basic
import Mathlib.Tactic

example (r a b : ℝ) (ha : a ≤ r) (hb : r ≤ b) : 0 ≤ min (r - a) (b - r) :=
  le_min_iff.mpr ⟨sub_nonneg.mpr ha, sub_nonneg.mpr hb⟩

piecewise.rsq_deriv_harmonic.desc: r² derivative = 0 for harmonic oscillator: 2x·ẋ + 2y·ẏ = 0 where ẋ=y, ẏ=-x
piecewise.rsq_deriv_harmonic.lean:
import Mathlib.Data.Real.Basic
import Mathlib.Tactic
open Real

example (x y : ℝ) : 2 * x * y + 2 * y * (-x) = 0 := by ring
